zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice  Elizabeth Foxmere於1427年出生在英國武斯特斯爾德洛特維其時，她的父親John Foxmere II19歲，母親Alice Margaret Fillongley23歲。她於1449年與Sir John Russell Esq.在英國多瑟特金斯頓 羅素結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1492年在英國多瑟特金斯頓 羅素享年65歲，埋葬在英國多瑟特斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice  Elizabeth Foxmere于1427年出生在英国武斯特斯爾德洛特維其时，她的父亲John Foxmere II19岁，母亲Alice Margaret Fillongley23岁。她于1449年与Sir John Russell Esq.在英国多瑟特金斯頓 羅素结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1492年在英国多瑟特金斯頓 羅素享年65岁，埋葬在英国多瑟特斯。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice  Elizabeth Foxmere was born in 1427, in Droitwich, Worcestershire, England, her father, John Foxmere II, was 19 and her mother, Alice Margaret Fillongley, was 23. She married Sir John Russell Esq. in 1449, in Kingston Russell, Dorset, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1492, in Kingston Russell, Dorset, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Swyre, Dorset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice  Elizabeth Foxmere est née en 1427, à Droitwich, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Foxmere II, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Alice Margaret Fillongley, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Russell Esq. en 1449, à Kingston Russell, Dorset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1492, à Kingston Russell, Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Swyre, Dorset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice  Elizabeth Foxmere 1427 in Droitwich, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Foxmere II 19 und ihre Mutter Alice Margaret Fillongley 23. Sie hat 1449 in Kingston Russell, Dorset, England Sir John Russell Esq. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1492 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Kingston Russell, Dorset, England und wurde in Swyre, Dorset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice  Elizabeth Foxmere è nata il nel 1427 nel Droitwich, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, John Foxmere II, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Alice Margaret Fillongley, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Russell Esq. nel 1449, nel Kingston Russell, Dorset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1492, nel Kingston Russell, Dorset, England, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Swyre, Dorset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice  Elizabeth Foxmereが1427年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアドロイトウィチで生まれた時，父John Foxmere IIは19歳，母Alice Margaret Fillongleyは23歳であった。1449年にイギリスドールセトキングストン ルセルでSir John Russell Esq.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1492年にイギリスドールセトキングストン ルセルで65歳で死去し，イギリスドールセトスウイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice  Elizabeth Foxmere(이)가 1427년 영국 워스스터실르 드로이트위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Foxmere II(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Margaret Fillongley(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1449년 영국 도르세트 킨그스턴 러셀에서 Sir John Russell Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1492년 영국 도르세트 킨그스턴 러셀에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 도르세트 스w이르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice  Elizabeth Foxmere nasceu em 1427, em Droitwich, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Foxmere II, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Alice Margaret Fillongley, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Russell Esq. em 1449, em Kingston Russell, Dorset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1492, em Kingston Russell, Dorset, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Swyre, Dorset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice  Elizabeth Foxmere родилась в 1427 г. в местности дроитвич, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Foxmere II было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Margaret Fillongley, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Russell Esq. в 1449 г. в местности кингстон расселл, дорсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1492 г. в местности кингстон расселл, дорсет, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности свир, дорсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice  Elizabeth Foxmere nació en 1427, en Droitwich, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Foxmere II, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Alice Margaret Fillongley, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir John Russell Esq. en 1449, en Kingston Russell, Dorset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1492, en Kingston Russell, Dorset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Swyre, Dorset, Inglaterra.
